title: Google Remy, Grok 5, Mythos 1, New Atlas Robot, ASI… and More AI News This Month!
summary: A video essay surveying major AI developments in a given month, including Google Remy (a Gemini agent), Grok 5, Anthropic Mythos 1, improved humanoid robots from Boston Dynamics and Unitree, and DeepSeek price cuts. The author argues these reflect a convergence toward AI agents capable of real work, coding, and autonomy rather than just question-answering.
